Anegan Roja Kadale Lyrics
Singer(s);Shankar Mahadevan, Sunidhi Chauhan, Chinmayi
Lyrics:Vairamuthu

Roja Kadale
en rajaa magalae
en aasai kaniye
vaa thaniyae.

kadhal thunaiye
en kannin maniye
en innorr uyire
vaa arugae.

pookkalil pillaai
punnagai killaai
ponnil vaarpadhu many.

poochediyin mel
kaattradithaalum
un nenjil thaikkumo aani

vaa vaa alaikadal siruthuli
vaa vaa penne
vaa vaa erimalai siru pori
vaa vaa

vaa vaa alaikadal siruthuli
vaa vaa kannaa
vaa vaa erimalai siru pori
vaa vaa

Olikandu eidhaalum
oli endrum thaeyaadhu
adhu pol nam kadhal maanae

Roja Kadale
en rajaa magalae
en aasai kaniye
vaa thaniyae.

kadhal thunaiye
en kannin maniye
en innorr uyire
vaa arugae.

Sevvaai kuyilae
pon sevvael vizhiye
en sevvaal kiliye vaa veliye

neervaar kuzhalae
kann naer kaan elilae
en maarmael mayile vaa veliye.

aattpadai kondu thaakkiya podhum
vaanam valaivadhillai
aarpadai kandu aarpariththalum
vettai alivadhum illai

povom nilam nilavukku povom
ini vazhvom uyirukku uyir
thandhu vazhvom

kanndangal pinndaalum
mandangal vinndaalum
nenjangal maraadhu vaa vaa

endrum  pirivae aillai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Roja Kadale'?

'Roja Kadale' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully conveyed through its lyrics by Vairamuthu.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Anegan'?

In Anegan, 'Roja Kadale' plays a pivotal role in showcasing the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of 'Roja Kadale'?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi, Shankar Mahadevan, and Sunidhi Chauhan.

Who composed the music for 'Roja Kadale'?

The music for 'Roja Kadale' was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his melodious tunes and captivating compositions.

When was 'Roja Kadale' released?

'Roja Kadale' was released on November 10, 2014, as part of the movie Anegan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Roja Kadale' is a romantic melody that beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and desire, making it a standout track in the film Anegan. The song features a harmonious blend of vocals from Chinmayi, Shankar Mahadevan, and Sunidhi Chauhan, creating an enchanting listening experience. Its lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, evoke a sense of longing and affection, resonating deeply with listeners. Overall, the song serves as a perfect backdrop for romantic moments, enhancing the film's narrative with its emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Roja Kadale from Anegan is a mesmerizing blend of soulful melodies and heartfelt lyrics, featuring the enchanting voices of Chinmayi, Shankar Mahadevan, and Sunidhi Chauhan. This romantic track, composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to any playlist. Dive into the captivating world of Roja Kadale and experience the magic of its lyrical beauty.
stanzaMeanings: Come, my beloved, my desire, come to me alone.
Love is my companion, my precious one, come, my other life, come close.
In flowers, the child smiles, and in gold, it shines beautifully.
Even if the wind blows on the flower, will it stay in your heart?
Come, come, little wave of the sea, come, girl, come, little wave, come, come.
Come, come, little wave of the sea, come, my dear, come, little wave, come, come.
Even if the sound fades away, our love will never fade, just like that.
Come, my beloved, my desire, come to me alone.
Love is my companion, my precious one, come, my other life, come close.
Come, little cuckoo, with your golden eyes, come out, my little bird.
The water pipe is not visible, my secrets are hidden, come out, my dear.
The sky cannot be contained with just a net; even if you see the trap, there is no hunt or escape.
We will go to the moon, now we will live, giving life to life.
Even if we see dreams or shadows, our hearts will not forget, come, come.
Come, little cuckoo, with your golden eyes, come out, my little bird.
The water pipe is not visible, my secrets are hidden, come out, my dear.
In the season of flowers, I will give you everything.
If the essence of the place flows, I will not forget you.
Even if the bow and arrow come together, there is no life without unity, and there is no separation in the essence of words.
Come, come, little wave of the sea, come, girl, come, little wave, come, come.
Come, come, little wave of the sea, come, my dear, come, little wave, come, come.
Even if we see dreams or shadows, our hearts will not forget, come, come.
